title: Building Blocks
headline: Building Blocks
subheadline: The foundational data infrastructure that powers every Tolemi solution.
body: Building Blocks is Tolemi's core data platform. It ingests, normalizes, and connects disparate city datasets—property records, permits, violations, and more—into a single unified data layer. Every Tolemi product is built on Building Blocks, and it's available as a standalone platform for cities that want to build their own solutions on top of clean, connected data.

features.title: Data Ingestion
features.description: Connect to existing city systems, spreadsheets, and third-party sources with pre-built integrations.

features.title: Data Normalization
features.description: Automatically clean, deduplicate, and standardize records across systems.

features.title: Unified Data Layer
features.description: Access all your city's property and compliance data through a single API and dashboard.

features.title: Custom Workflows
features.description: Build automated workflows on top of your connected data without writing code.
